tasks.instruction: Register for a Saturday beginner-level workshop that starts at or after 5:00 PM, lasts 90 minutes or less, and complete the registration for one attendee.

target_names: Beginner Solar Workshop: Understanding Your Electric Bill

tasks.instruction: Add three non-overlapping sessions across two different days to your personal schedule, including at least one introductory session and at least one advanced session.

tasks.instruction: Make a one-time donation between $30 and $40 to an active education-focused fund, do not choose to cover processing fees, use an offline or pay-at-event payment option, and opt in to the email newsletter.

tasks.instruction: Sign up for the earliest available Sunday morning volunteer shift that starts between 8:00 AM and 10:00 AM and lasts at least 3 hours, completing the signup for one person.

tasks.instruction: Use the site’s solar savings calculator for ZIP code 30301 with a typical monthly electric bill around $120, adjust the system size until estimated savings are at least $40 per month while upfront cost stays under $10,000, and then save the estimate with your contact details.
